questionHtml: The critical mass for weapons-grade uranium can be as small as 15 kg. Outline what is meant by critical mass by referring to the equation in (a)(i).
markschemeHtml:
mass/amount/quantity required so that «on average» each fission/reaction results in a further fission/reaction  [✔]

at least one of the «3» neutrons produced must cause another reaction  [✔]

 

Note: Accept “minimum mass of fuel needed for the reaction to be self-sustaining”.

meta.title: The critical mass for weapons-grade uranium can be as small as 15 kg. Outline what is meant by critical mass by referring to the equation in (a)(i).
